file.content: # MMS Design Specification > **Internal Document** - Implementation guide for the interactive demo with Astro.js + deck.gl > > **Source of Truth**: `docs/RFQ.md` only > > **Primary Feature**: Planning View with Sandbox Mode (What-If Scenarios) --- ## 1. Visual Mood & Design Philosophy ### 1.1 Design Reference: Linear App We adopt Linear's visual mood as our design foundation - not its solutions, but its aesthetic sensibility. **What we take from Linear:** - Minimalist, focused interface - Dark mode as default - Generous whitespace - Subtle borders and shadows - Smooth micro-interactions - Typography-first hierarchy **What we solve differently:** - Railway maintenance planning (not software projects) - Mileage-based scheduling (not sprint-based) - 12-year strategic view (not quarterly roadmaps) - What-if simulation mode (not just viewing) ### 1.2 Moodboard #### Data Visualization References *Kepler.gl: GPU-accelerated data visualization with deck.gl - our rendering engine* *Flowmap.blue: Clean timeline-based flow visualization* *Microsoft SandDance: Interactive data exploration with smooth transitions* #### Dashboard & Enterprise UI References *Figma Dark Theme Dashboard: Enterprise-grade dark UI patterns* *Nile Dashboard: Comprehensive dark mode design system* #### Railway/Maintenance Industry References *Railfleet (Railnova): Competitor reference - fleet planning dashboard with Gantt view* --- ## 2. Problem вҶ’ Solution Matrix Based on RFQ pain points, here's how the demo addresses each: | # | Client Pain Point (RFQ) | Demo Solution | Screen/Component | |---|------------------------|---------------|------------------| | 1 | No dedicated mileage management tools | Purpose-built mileage dashboard with real-time tracking | Dashboard + KPI Cards | | 2 | IBM Maximo only does asset management | Integrated mileage + maintenance planning | Planning View | | 3 | Manual Excel management | Interactive visual timeline with drag operations | Planning View (Timeline) | | 4 | Folder-driven data storage | Centralized visualization of all fleet data | Sidebar + Data Grid | | 5 | Limited maintenance-operations integration | Single pane of glass for both teams | Unified Planning View | | 6 | Non-compliance risk (underrun/overrun) | Visual alerts + compliance indicators | Alert Banners + Color coding | | 7 | No predictive simulations | **Sandbox Mode** for what-if scenarios | Sandbox Mode (Primary Feature) | | 8 | Insufficient resource visibility | Resource utilization panels | Resource Panel + Heatmap | | 9 | Manual handling delays | Automated scheduling visualization | Timeline + Conflict Detection | --- ## 3. Design System ### 3.1 Color Palette (Dark Mode) Inspired by Linear's dark theme with railway-specific semantic colors. ``` BACKGROUND в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ bg-primary: #0D0D0D (Pure dark) bg-secondary: #1A1A1A (Elevated surfaces) bg-tertiary: #262626 (Cards, panels) bg-hover: #333333 (Interactive hover) BORDERS & DIVIDERS в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ border-subtle: #2E2E2E (Subtle separation) border-default: #404040 (Default borders) border-strong: #525252 (Emphasized borders) TEXT в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ text-primary: #FFFFFF (Headlines, important) text-secondary: #A3A3A3 (Body text) text-tertiary: #737373 (Labels, captions) text-disabled: #525252 (Disabled states) SEMANTIC -
